notes: Gesture -> Play favorite or URL. New action play_uri: loads a specific source (Sonos favorite or arbitrary stream URL) via SetAVTransportURI then Play. Firmware pieces: SonosController.cd() for ContentDirectory SOAP; browseFavorites() parses FV:2 into {title, uri, meta} tuples, honoring the res-with-attributes tag shape (tagAny helper). /api/favorites returns the list as JSON with metadata inline (single round-trip per gesture-fire — no re-browse at play time). Mapping param is 'URI' or 'URI\nMETA' — DIDL meta is required for cloud content (Sonos rejects 714 without it) and omitted for raw stream URLs. Client: gesture picker sprouts an inline editor when play_uri is selected — text input for raw URL plus a scrollable Sonos favorites list. Save applies the composite param via existing /api/setmap. Auto-resume snapshot piggybacks: the URI you fire from a gesture becomes the zone's fallback for empty-Play too.
